notes: v0.29.0 — LONG CANNON is the new LANCE. All four canon LANCE skins (ASH / VECTOR / SOLSTICE / VOID) now render as LONG CANNON variants everywhere — lobby preview, class page, locker, in-match PvP. Each variant tweaks rings/muzzle/fins/cockpit (twin fins + spike muzzle for SOLSTICE, halo muzzle + delta wings for VOID, etc.) so the four read as distinct loadout items. TESTS > LANCE shows the same four at full card size for side-by-side preview.
